# STUDIZ — Exact Python dependency versions (generated by pip freeze)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# This file captures the exact versions installed on the development machine.
# Use it when you need a bit-for-bit reproducible install on a new server:
#
#   pip install -r python/requirements-lock.txt
#
# Regenerate after any `pip install --upgrade` or new package install:
#
#   pip freeze | grep -E "^(PyMuPDF|pytesseract|Pillow|python-docx|python-pptx|openpyxl|xlrd)" > python/requirements-lock.txt
#
# This file is gitignored by default (see .gitignore) because the exact
# versions differ per server and Python version. Generate it fresh on
# each deployment target after running:
#
#   pip install -r python/requirements.txt
#
# Then commit the result for that server's lockfile if reproducibility
# across team members matters more than per-server flexibility.
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------

openpyxl==3.1.5
Pillow==12.2.0
PyMuPDF==1.27.2.3
pytesseract==0.3.13
python-docx==1.2.0
python-pptx==1.0.2
xlrd==2.0.2
